title: Best of Kenya Safari
description: This short but immersive safari explores central and southern Kenya, from the Aberdares to Lake Nakuru and Maasai Mara. Guests enjoy iconic wildlife, stunning landscapes, and optional game drives. The Great Wildebeest Migration can be witnessed from July to October in the Maasai Mara.
highlights: Aberdares wildlife viewing at The Ark Lodge
Flamingoes and rhinos at Lake Nakuru National Park
Game drives in Maasai Mara with chances to witness the Great Wildebeest Migration
Luxury lodge accommodation with meals included

itinerary.title: Arrival and Transfer to Aberdares
itinerary.description: Arrival on KQ 311 from Dubai, customs formalities, then drive to Aberdares Country Club. Transfer to The Ark Lodge for overnight stay. Afternoon wildlife viewing at waterhole.

itinerary.title: Aberdares to Lake Nakuru
itinerary.description: After breakfast, drive to Lake Nakuru National Park (3.5 hours). Lunch at Lake Nakuru Sopa Lodge. Afternoon game drive to view flamingoes, rhinos, and Rothschild giraffe.

itinerary.title: Lake Nakuru to Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Drive to Mara Elatia Camp in Maasai Mara (5 hours). Afternoon game drive. Witness the Great Wildebeest Migration if visiting between July–October.

itinerary.title: Full Day in Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Morning and afternoon game drives in Maasai Mara. Optional full day game drive with packed lunch.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Early morning departure at 08:30 from Maasai Mara. Arrival in Nairobi in time for KQ 310 flight to Dubai departing at 17:00 hrs.

included: Accommodation on full board basis (breakfast, lunch, and dinner) in the mentioned lodges
Exclusive use of safari-equipped Landcruiser (not shared)
Professional driver guide and pre-tour briefing
All park entrance fees and relevant taxes
notIncluded: Personal expenses such as travel insurance, laundry, phone calls
accommodation: Lake Nakuru Sopa Lodge – Lake Nakuru (1 night)
Mara Elatia Camp – Maasai Mara (2 nights)

travelInfo.clothes: Bring mosquito repellent, sunscreen, hat, sunglasses, and malaria medication. Highlands can be cool in mornings and evenings, so a sweater and long trousers/jeans are recommended.
travelInfo.food: Most lodges serve buffet-style meals; a few offer set menus. Food is of international standard, prepared by professional chefs.

note: Adventures Connect LTD reserves the right to substitute accommodations with similar facilities in circumstances beyond our control.
